title: cert-manager Issuer and ClusterIssuer
description: JSON Schema for cert-manager Issuer and ClusterIssuer custom resources (cert-manager.io/v1). An Issuer represents a certificate authority scoped to a single namespace, while a ClusterIssuer is cluster-scoped and can serve Certificate resources across all namespaces. Both resources configure the backend certificate authority connection including ACME, CA, SelfSigned, Vault, and Venafi issuer types.

kind.description: The resource kind: Issuer (namespace-scoped) or ClusterIssuer (cluster-scoped).

metadata.description: Kubernetes ObjectMeta for the Issuer or ClusterIssuer resource.

name.description: Name of the Issuer or ClusterIssuer resource.

namespace.description: Namespace for Issuer resources. Not used for ClusterIssuer.

IssuerSpec.description: Desired state of the Issuer or ClusterIssuer resource. Exactly one issuer type must be configured: acme, ca, selfSigned, vault, or venafi.

ACMEIssuer.description: Configuration for an ACME (RFC 8555) certificate authority such as Let's Encrypt, ZeroSSL, or a private ACME server. ACME issuers obtain certificates by completing DNS or HTTP challenges proving domain ownership.

server.description: URL of the ACME server's directory endpoint. For Let's Encrypt production: https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory. For Let's Encrypt staging: https://acme-staging-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory.

email.description: Email address for the ACME account registration. Used for expiry notifications from the CA.

externalAccountBinding.description: Optional External Account Binding (EAB) configuration required by some ACME providers (e.g., ZeroSSL) to associate the ACME account with an existing account in the CA's system.

keyID.description: The key identifier provided by the CA for EAB.

keySecretRef.description: Reference to a Secret containing the EAB HMAC key.

key.description: Key within the Secret containing the HMAC key value.

keyAlgorithm.description: HMAC algorithm used for the EAB key.

privateKeySecretRef.description: Reference to the Secret where the ACME account private key is stored. cert-manager will generate and store the private key here if it does not already exist.

name.description: Name of the Secret containing the ACME account private key.

key.description: Key within the Secret containing the private key. Defaults to 'tls.key'.

skipTLSVerify.description: Whether to disable TLS certificate verification when communicating with the ACME server. Only use for development/testing with self-signed ACME servers.

preferredChain.description: Name of the preferred certificate chain to use when multiple chains are offered by the CA. For example, 'ISRG Root X1' for Let's Encrypt.

caBundle.description: Base64-encoded PEM bundle of CA certificates to trust when verifying the ACME server's TLS certificate. Used with private ACME servers.

solvers.description: List of challenge solver configurations used by the ACME issuer for domain ownership verification. At least one solver is required. Solvers are selected by matching selectors against the domains in a certificate request.

disableAccountKeyGeneration.description: Whether to disable automatic generation of the ACME account private key. If true, the key must already exist in the Secret referenced by privateKeySecretRef.

enableDurationFeature.description: Whether to request a specific certificate duration from the ACME server using the ACME renewalInfo (ARI) extension. Only supported by some ACME servers.

ACMEChallengeSolver.description: A challenge solver configuration specifying how to complete ACME challenges for matching domains. A solver may use HTTP-01 or DNS-01 challenge types.

selector.description: Optional selector restricting which Certificate requests and domains this solver applies to. If omitted, this solver is used as a fallback.

dnsNames.description: DNS names that this solver handles. Takes priority over dnsZones when both match.

items.description: An exact DNS name this solver handles.

dnsZones.description: DNS zones that this solver handles. A solver is selected if the domain is a subdomain of any listed zone.

matchLabels.description: Label selector matching Certificate resources this solver should be used for.

http01.description: HTTP-01 challenge solver configuration. cert-manager creates temporary Ingress or Gateway API resources to serve the challenge response over HTTP.

class.description: Ingress class annotation value for the temporary challenge Ingress. Deprecated; use ingressClassName instead.

ingressClassName.description: IngressClass name for the challenge Ingress resource.

name.description: Name of an existing Ingress resource to append challenge rules to.

serviceType.description: Kubernetes Service type for the HTTP-01 challenge server. Defaults to NodePort.

gatewayHTTPRoute.description: Gateway API-based HTTP-01 challenge solver using HTTPRoute resources.

parentRefs.description: Gateway parent references for the challenge HTTPRoute.

labels.description: Labels to add to the challenge HTTPRoute.

podTemplate.description: Optional template for the Pod created to serve the HTTP-01 challenge response.

dns01.description: DNS-01 challenge solver configuration. cert-manager creates temporary DNS TXT records to prove domain ownership.

cnameStrategy.description: Strategy for following CNAME records when resolving DNS for challenges.

acmeDNS.description: acme-dns server configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

akamai.description: Akamai FastDNS configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

azureDNS.description: Azure DNS configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

cloudDNS.description: Google Cloud DNS configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

cloudflare.description: Cloudflare DNS configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

digitalocean.description: DigitalOcean DNS configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

rfc2136.description: RFC 2136 (Dynamic DNS Update) configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

route53.description: AWS Route53 DNS configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

webhook.description: External webhook DNS provider configuration for DNS-01 challenges.

CAIssuer.description: Configuration for a CA issuer that signs certificates using a CA certificate stored in a Kubernetes Secret. The CA certificate and private key must already exist in the cluster.

secretName.description: Name of the Secret containing the CA certificate (tls.crt) and CA private key (tls.key) in the same namespace as the Issuer, or in the cert-manager namespace for ClusterIssuer.

crlDistributionPoints.description: Optional list of CRL Distribution Point URLs to embed in issued certificates.

ocspServers.description: Optional list of OCSP server URLs to embed in issued certificates.

issuingCertificateURLs.description: Optional list of Issuing Certificate URLs to embed in issued certificates (AIA extension).

SelfSignedIssuer.description: Configuration for a SelfSigned issuer that signs certificates with their own private key. Useful for bootstrapping PKI hierarchies or generating self-signed CA certificates. No configuration is required.

crlDistributionPoints.description: Optional list of CRL Distribution Point URLs to embed in issued self-signed certificates.

VaultIssuer.description: Configuration for a HashiCorp Vault issuer that signs certificates using Vault's PKI Secrets Engine.

server.description: URL of the HashiCorp Vault server (e.g., https://vault.example.com).

path.description: Vault PKI path for signing certificates (e.g., pki/sign/my-role or pki_int/sign/my-role).

namespace.description: Vault namespace for Vault Enterprise clusters.

caBundle.description: Base64-encoded PEM CA bundle for verifying the Vault server's TLS certificate.

auth.description: Vault authentication configuration. Exactly one authentication method must be specified.

tokenSecretRef.description: Vault token authentication using a token stored in a Kubernetes Secret.

name.description: Name of the Secret containing the Vault token.

key.description: Key within the Secret containing the Vault token. Defaults to 'token'.

appRole.description: Vault AppRole authentication using a role ID and secret ID.

secretRef.description: Reference to a Secret containing the AppRole secret ID.

key.description: Key within the Secret. Defaults to 'secretId'.

kubernetes.description: Vault Kubernetes auth using a Kubernetes ServiceAccount token.

mountPath.description: Kubernetes auth mount path. Defaults to /v1/auth/kubernetes.

serviceAccountRef.description: Optional reference to a specific ServiceAccount to use for authentication.

VenafiIssuer.description: Configuration for a Venafi (CyberArk) issuer that signs certificates using Venafi Trust Protection Platform (TPP) or Venafi as a Service (VaaS/TLS Protect Cloud).

zone.description: Venafi policy zone path. For TPP, this is the policy folder path. For VaaS, this is the application name and issuing template.

tpp.description: Venafi Trust Protection Platform (TPP) connection configuration.

url.description: Base URL of the Venafi TPP server (e.g., https://tpp.example.com/vedsdk).

caBundle.description: Base64-encoded PEM CA bundle for verifying the TPP server TLS certificate.

credentialsRef.description: Reference to a Secret containing TPP username and password.

name.description: Name of the Secret containing the TPP credentials.

cloud.description: Venafi as a Service (TLS Protect Cloud) connection configuration.

url.description: URL of the Venafi Cloud API. Defaults to https://api.venafi.cloud.

apiTokenSecretRef.description: Reference to a Secret containing the Venafi Cloud API token.

name.description: Name of the Secret containing the Venafi Cloud API token.

key.description: Key within the Secret. Defaults to 'api-key'.

IssuerStatus.description: Observed state of the Issuer or ClusterIssuer as maintained by the cert-manager controller.

conditions.description: List of status conditions. The Ready condition indicates whether the issuer is ready to sign certificates.

acme.description: ACME-specific status including the registered account URI.

uri.description: URL of the registered ACME account.

lastRegisteredEmail.description: Last email address used for the ACME account registration.

lastPrivateKeyHash.description: Hash of the ACME account private key for detecting key changes.

IssuerCondition.description: A status condition on an Issuer or ClusterIssuer resource.

type.description: The condition type. Ready indicates the issuer is ready to sign certificates.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason code for the condition.

message.description: Human-readable message providing context for the condition status.

lastTransitionTime.description: Time at which the condition last transitioned.

observedGeneration.description: Spec generation this condition was computed from.
